title: Doff Multi Purpose Pour & Feed – 1.5L Fast-Acting Ready to Use Plant Food for Healthy Growth of Flowers, Fruits & Vegetables – Plant Fertiliser to Encourage Root Development
features: VERSATILE PLANT NUTRITION – Boost the health of flowers, fruits and vegetables with Doff Multi Purpose Pour & Feed. Providing a balanced combination of nutrients, this fast-acting plant fertiliser promotes healthier, stronger plants in outdoor gardens and indoor plants

BOOST GROWTH & RESILIENCE – Ready to use 100% plant-based feed enhances flowering, supports the growth of fruits and vegetables and improves overall plant health from root to tip. Simply pour 2.5 caps of the plant fertiliser directly at the base of the plant, every 4-7 days

EASY-TO-USE FORMULA – This multi purpose plant care liquid is supplied premixed for ultimate convenience. Whether nurturing hanging baskets or expansive gardens, Doff’s plant food saves time and effort, offering professional results with minimal fuss

RELIABLE & EFFECTIVE RESULTS – This high-quality garden fertiliser provides consistent nutrition for thriving plants year-round. Ideal for indoor and outdoor plants, this 1.5-litre feed supports healthy growth and increases yields in plants large and small

NOURISHING PLANT FEED – With decades of expert experience, Doff products are your go-to for vibrant, healthy plants. Our quality-crafted feeds and straight solutions are proudly made in the UK, offering effective and complete nutritional plant food to help your garden grow
